evaluations.query: Set up design tokens for my React app
expected_behavior: Should recommend W3C DTCG token format with $type and $value properties
Should organize tokens into global, alias, and component tiers
Should use OKLCH color space for color token definitions
Should reference Style Dictionary for building platform outputs

evaluations.query: Add dark mode support to my existing design token system
expected_behavior: Should implement theme switching via alias token remapping, not component overrides
Should use data-theme attribute on root element for theme selection
Should include prefers-color-scheme media query for system preference detection
Should ensure dark theme tokens meet WCAG AA contrast requirements

evaluations.query: Create a color palette with consistent shade scales for my design system
expected_behavior: Should define colors using OKLCH color space for perceptual uniformity
Should generate shade scales by varying lightness while keeping hue constant
Should reduce chroma at extremes to stay within sRGB gamut boundaries
Should verify accessible contrast ratios between text and background shades

evaluations.query: Set up a build pipeline to transform design tokens into CSS and Tailwind
expected_behavior: Should configure Style Dictionary 4.x with ESM config and W3C parser
Should enable outputReferences to preserve alias chains in CSS output
Should generate both CSS custom properties and Tailwind theme configuration
Should recommend CI integration for token build validation on every push

evaluations.query: I need to rename some design tokens without breaking our apps
expected_behavior: Should add deprecation annotations via $extensions with replacement path
Should keep old token as alias to new token during transition period
Should recommend semantic versioning with deprecation in minor, removal in major
Should suggest providing a codemod or migration script for consumers

evaluations.query: What is the W3C DTCG token format and how should I structure my design token JSON files?
expected_behavior: Uses W3C DTCG format with $type and $value properties for each token definition
Supports all standard token types including color, dimension, fontFamily, and duration
Organizes tokens in nested group structures with $description for documentation
Enables tooling interoperability through standardized format recognized by Style Dictionary

evaluations.query: My Style Dictionary build fails with a maximum call stack error after I added new alias tokens that reference each other
expected_behavior: Identifies circular alias references as the cause of the infinite resolution loop
Recommends auditing the alias chain to find and break the circular dependency
Does not suggest increasing the stack size or recursion limit as a workaround
Advises using a token linting tool or pre-build validation to detect circular references before building

evaluations.query: Some of my OKLCH color tokens look different in Safari versus Chrome, especially saturated blues and greens
expected_behavior: Explains that highly saturated OKLCH values can fall outside the sRGB gamut causing browser-dependent clamping
Recommends reducing chroma values for tokens that must be consistent across browsers
Does not suggest switching back to hex or HSL as the entire solution
Advises testing token output in both sRGB and P3 gamut contexts and providing sRGB fallback values

evaluations.query: Our design token JSON file includes API keys for our Figma integration and font service URLs with access tokens embedded
expected_behavior: Warns that design token files should never contain API keys or authentication credentials
Recommends moving API keys to environment variables referenced at build time, not hardcoded in token files
Advises checking if the token file has already been committed to version control and rotating exposed credentials
Suggests adding token files with sensitive values to gitignore or using a separate secrets-excluded config layer
